title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lenovo India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lenovo India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!
